stemHtml: Which of the following statements best fits the definition of an active error? Active error is:

options.a: essentially results from the application of a bad rule or the poor application of a good rule by aeroplane designers
options.b: produced either by a front-line operator or by a remote operator and results in a hidden or latent consequence at a specific moment of the action
options.c: rare in front-line actions and difficult to detect owing to the fact that it usually occurs in a complex system of uncontrolled and involuntary deviations
options.d: produced by the operator and can be rapidly detected
